text.title: Docker Compose (Infrastructure) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Docker Compose (Infrastructure) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: classify-tiers
step.action: Mark each service as app / db / cache / worker.

step.name: name-volumes
step.action: Declare named volumes; document data flow.

step.name: emit-compose
step.action: Write compose.yaml; verify config with docker compose config.
